primary_sources.title: The open source ecosystem underpins nearly every software system in the world. As AI grows more capable, open source security becomes increasingly important. We're donating to the Linux Foundation to continue to help secure the foundations AI runs on.

We’re reviewing Codex for Open Source applications on a rolling basis. Here are some of the projects and maintainers who just joined our Codex for OSS community 👇 https://x.com/athasdev/status/2033961305795645506?s=20

supporting_sources.title: Pinned: How do we measure progress toward AGI? It takes a village – and a bit of healthy competition. 🛠️ We’re launching a global hackathon with @Kaggle to build new cognitive evaluations for AI. With $200k in prizes up for grabs, help us put our framework to the test. Join the challenge → https://goo.gle/4uqOVKK

fact_anchors.claim: The open source ecosystem underpins nearly every software system in the world. As AI grows more capable, open source security becomes increasingly important. We're donating to the Linux Foundation to continue to help secure the foundations AI runs on.

forbidden_claims: No unsupported percentage claims about performance or cost change.
No unsupported claim that this release fully replaces existing workflows.
No unsupported claim that all teams should adopt immediately.
